name: Sketch
description: Quick drawing pad that mounts above the chat composer. Sketch an idea with pen, shapes, or eraser and send it as an image attachment.
author: contex

chatSurfaces.label: Sketch
chatSurfaces.description: Draw or import a screenshot and attach it to your next message or Builder pass.

actions.name: getPayload
actions.description: Return the current sketch image payload and design handoff metadata.
